task: Add rate limiting middleware to the auth module

plan.plan_summary: Create packages/server/src/middleware/rate-limit.ts, export rateLimit from packages/server/src/middleware/index.ts, preserve withMiddleware in packages/server/src/routes/api.ts, then verify with ./scripts/verify-rate-limit.sh.

research.answer: The middleware index exports reusable middleware from packages/server/src/middleware/index.ts.
The API route uses withMiddleware in packages/server/src/routes/api.ts.

final_response: Added rateLimit middleware, exported it, kept the existing withMiddleware architecture, and ran verify successfully.
